jobs.title: Software Engineer, New Grad (2027)
jobs.content: <div><p>We are hiring new graduates (class of 2027) to build backend systems in Python and TypeScript on AWS.</p><p>Visa sponsorship available for this role, including H-1B sponsorship and STEM OPT accepted.</p></div>

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Platform
jobs.content: <p>8+ years of experience required. We are unable to sponsor visas for this position.</p>

jobs.title: Machine Learning Engineer, Early Career
jobs.content: <p>Join our LLM evaluation team. Experience with Python, RAG pipelines and distributed systems is a plus. Employment is contingent on your ability to work in the United States; this role is not eligible for visa sponsorship now or in the future.</p>

jobs.title: Defense Systems Software Engineer I
jobs.content: <p>Entry level engineers welcome. Active security clearance required; U.S. citizenship is required due to ITAR restrictions.</p>

jobs.title: Data Engineer, University Graduate
jobs.content: <p>Build data pipelines with SQL and Python in our London office.</p>
